channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy released after Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Collin Morikawa birdies final hole for a 1-shot lead at Bay Hill
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Collin Morikawa left Bay Hill a year ago with an 80 on his scorecard and a second straight missed cut in the Arnold Palmer Invitational. That wasn't on his mind when he arrived to this signature event because it was more about the state of his game than the golf course.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies dominate Air Force in regular season finale
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Mason Falslev scored 18 points on 8-of-10 shooting to lead the Utah State basketball team to a dominating 87-47 win over Air Force. The Aggies finish the regular season with a record of 25-6 overall, 15-5 in the Mountain West Conference.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Barcelona's Spanish league game is postponed after death of team doctor
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona’s home game against Osasuna in the Spanish league was postponed on Saturday after the death of first-team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia. Fans were informed of the decision around 15 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick off at 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Amber Whiting resigns as BYU women's basketball coach
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU women's basketball coach Amber Whiting announced she is resigning after three seasons in Provo. The decision to part ways was mutual between Whiting and the school. Assistant coach Lee Cummard will serve as the interim head coach for now.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sweet Sixteen: Liverpool's lead in Premier League grows to 16 points as ailing Man City loses again
item.description: Liverpool's lead in the Premier League has grown to 16 points. Mohamed Salah's lead in the Golden Boot contest is up to seven goals.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Shaun White kicks off new league with visions of snowboarding riches on the halfpipe
item.description: ASPEN, Colo. (AP) — Shaun White's next trick might carry more risk than the flips and twists he pulled off for decades inside all those halfpipes he used to dominate. This time, it's about making magic — and money — for the generation of snowboarders who looked up to him for all those years.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daylight saving time is coming and the golf industry can't wait
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — Looking forward to more evening sunlight thanks to daylight saving time this weekend? Many in the golf industry like the time change, too, and they are pushing to make that annual switch permanent.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde,Bjorkstrand as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC's historic home opener draws record crowd
item.description: Fans were buzzing with excitement as San Diego FC kicked off their inaugural MLS home opener against St. Louis City SC on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC makes its home debut before a sellout crowd in a city hungry for top-level soccer
item.description: A match decades in the making finally happens Saturday night when San Diego FC debuts on its home field in front of a sellout crowd of fans starved for elite professional sports — and particularly hungry for top-level soccer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
